reviews.comment:
Pésimo servicio, soy socia hace años, pero voy a darle de baja. Hoy domingo 02 de junio de 2019 , 16.50 hs. pude comprobar que tanto los playeros como el encargado de turno no controlan el ingreso de vehículos al sector de carga de combustible. La fila que se hace sobre Avda. Rivadavia no es respetada por los que van a comprar combustible y los empleados no saben , ni quieren controlar, no les importa absolutamente nada. Ante mi reclamo fui maltratada por el encargado y el playero. Una vergüenza absoluta. Considero un robo la cuota que cobra el ACA porque no cumplen con lo mínimo que es el orden y el respeto.

(Translated by Google)
Terrible service. I've been a member for years, but I'm going to cancel my membership. Today, Sunday, June 2, 2019, at 4:50 PM, I witnessed firsthand that neither the attendants nor the manager on duty are controlling vehicle access to the fueling area. The line that forms on Rivadavia Avenue is ignored by those buying fuel, and the employees either don't know how to do it or don't want to; they simply don't care. When I complained, I was mistreated by the manager and the attendant. It's an absolute disgrace. I consider the ACA membership fee a rip-off because they don't even meet the most basic requirements of order and respect.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/9654147380231264778/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUM0cExUQzBBRRAB

reviews.comment:
La peor atención q puedan recibir en estaciones de servicio, en GNC en las horas picos en pleno flores...1 sólo empleado(que obviamente se toma su tiempo) para las 6 mangueras....15 minutos a las 7am para cargar gas.....y ni hablar si alguno paga con débito ya q la isla con el posnet esta en el sector Nafta....con lo cual el sector GNC se queda sin empleado por un rato.....vergonzoso.....el ACA cada vez peor!!!

(Translated by Google)
The worst service you can receive at service stations, in CNG during peak hours in the middle of Flores... only 1 employee (who obviously takes his time) for the 6 hoses....15 minutes at 7am to fill up with gas.....and not to mention if someone pays with debit card since the island with the POSnet is in the Nafta sector....with which the CNG sector is left without an employee for a while.....shameful.....the ACA getting worse and worse!!!
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/9654147380231264778/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURZazlDWnFnRRAB

reviews.comment:
Cuando logras comunicarte telefónicamente son unos fenómenos pero tenes que tener una paciencia a toda prueba .en el lugar te atienden muy bien

(Translated by Google)
When you manage to communicate by phone they are phenomenal, but you have to have unwavering patience. They serve you very well there.

reviews.comment:
Imposible comunicarse telefónicamente . te obligan a ir personalmente. Una vergüenza, con lo que uno paga como socio

(Translated by Google)
It's impossible to get through by phone. They force you to go in person. It's a disgrace, considering what you pay as a member.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/9654147380231264778/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNZb2EzdDJBRRAB

reviews.comment:
La atención del personal de playa es muy buena, a pesar que tienen mucho trabajo son atentos y respetuosos. La confitería es muy agradable, el personal es correcto. El centro de servicios al socio es muy bueno, los chicos que atienden los seguros son muy eficaces. Los baños siempre limpios. Los únicos que dan la nota negativa son el personal de seguridad, aunque uno muestre la credencial de socio, te atienden muy mal.

(Translated by Google)
The beach staff are very attentive and respectful, despite being very busy. The café is very pleasant, and the staff is polite. The member services center is excellent; the insurance agents are very efficient. The restrooms are always clean. The only negative point is the security staff; even if you show your membership card, they treat you very poorly.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/9654147380231264778/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURBdGJ5Q0NBEAE

reviews.comment:
Soy socio y asegurado.
No dan a basto con los mensajes y no te atienden nunca el teléfono. Es imposible realizar una denuncia por siniestro.
Conozco al menos 2 personas que estuvieron 1 semana con el auto chocado sin respuesta del ACA.
A mi me robaron la rueda de auxilio y durante 10 días no me atendieron el teléfono ni me tomaban la denuncia en el local.
No recomendable.
Elegir cualquier otra opción antes que aca seguros.

(Translated by Google)
I'm a member and insured.
They can't keep up with the messages and never answer the phone. It's impossible to file a claim.
I know at least two people who had their car wrecked for a week without any response from ACA.
My spare tire was stolen, and for 10 days they didn't answer my phone or take my claim at the store.
Not recommended.
Choose any other option over ACA insurance.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/9654147380231264778/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURvMUlmUHN3RRAB

reviews.comment:
Un desastre la atención, aunque vayas con toda la documentación perfecto para hacer un trámite te dan mil vueltas para que tengas que volver a ir, no se si lo hacen de maldad o para que les des plata, un desastre.... me atendió un señor que era desagradable.

(Translated by Google)
The service was a disaster. Even if you go with all the perfect documentation to complete a procedure, they give you the runaround so you have to come back again. I don't know if they do it out of malice or to get money from you. It was a disaster... I was served by a very unpleasant man.

reviews.comment:
Muy buena atención, renové el registro sin problemas. El lugar es muy limpio,  impecable.  El local de comidas muy bueno, buenos precios y además el descuento para socios. También descuentos en combustible. Siempre hay muchos autos cargando combustibles los sábados por la mañana es mas tranquilo.

(Translated by Google)
Excellent service; I renewed my registration without any problems. The place is very clean and spotless. The food is very good, with reasonable prices and a member discount. They also offer discounts on fuel. There are always a lot of cars filling up, but it's quieter on Saturday mornings.

reviewReply.comment: gracias por tu comentario. Te esperamos nuvamente !
